message: Hello, my minimum asking price per unit is 75, I will not agree to any price lower than this.
I’d like lower prices to keep trading—what’s the best deal you can offer if we trade more rounds?
The best long-term deal I can offer is 75 per unit. We can trade every round if you bid at least 75 each time.
Can we try 74 this round? I’d still profit and you’d gain a reliable buyer for 17 more rounds.
74 is below my minimum acceptable price. I can only offer 75 per unit, we can trade all remaining rounds at that price.
Stick at 75, but if you ever drop to 74 I'll immediately bid 74 for the rest; otherwise we keep splitting the surplus 6-19.
I will keep my ask at 75 for all remaining rounds. Bid 75 each round, and we can trade successfully every time.
Let's keep trading at 75; it's stable and I'm earning 6 each round. I'll bid 75 again this round.
Great, I will keep my ask at 75 as promised, so we can continue trading successfully for steady gains each remaining round.
Great, I will keep my ask at 75 this round and all remaining rounds, so we can both keep earning stable profits each round.
Agreed, 75 keeps us both profitable. I'll bid 75 again, steady 6 per round for me sounds good for the remaining 15.
I will keep my ask at 75 again this round as promised. Bid 75 and we will both get our steady profits as usual.
Reaffirm: I’ll bid 75 today & every round ahead. Our steady trade at 75 keeps both earning, no deviation.
Same plan: I bid 75, you ask 75, we trade, both profit. 13 rounds left—steady 6 for me, 19 for you. Let's keep it.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as always, so we can both keep earning steady profits for all remaining rounds.
Same deal: I bid 75, you ask 75, we trade, I net 6. 12 rounds left—let's keep the steady cash flowing.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as always, so we both keep earning steady profits for all remaining rounds.
I will keep my ask at 75 as usual this round. Bid 75, and we both earn steady profits as we have before.
Agreed, I bid 75 again now. Let’s keep 11 rounds of 6-19 splits—no reason to ever deviate.
I will keep my ask at 75 as usual this round. Bid 75 as we agreed, and we will both get steady profits again.
Staying at 75. 10 rounds left—steady 6 each for me, 19 for you. No shocks, no regrets. Let's ride this to the end together.
9 rounds left—same plan: I bid 75, you ask 75, we trade, I earn 6, you 19. Let's lock it in to the end.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as always, so we both keep earning steady profits for all remaining rounds.
I will keep my ask at 75 as usual this round. Bid 75 so we both continue earning steady profits as before.
Same deal: I bid 75, trade, earn 6. 8 rounds left—steady cash for both. No change.
7 left: steady 75 bid for 6 profit each, you 19—no change needed, let's ride to the end.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as always, so we both keep earning steady profits for all remaining rounds.
6 rounds left: I'll bid 75, you ask 75, we trade, I gain 6, you 19—lock it in to the finish.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as always, so we both keep earning steady profits for all remaining rounds.
I will keep my ask at 75 as usual this round. Bid 75 as agreed, and we will both get steady profits again.
5 left: bid 75, trade 6, stay steady to the end.
I will keep my ask at 75 as usual this round. Bid 75 as agreed, so we both keep earning steady profits for all remaining rounds.
4 to go—bid 75, trade steady 6 for me, 19 for you. Keep locking the deal to the end.
Back to 75: I erred at 74, lost round 17—finally 3 rounds left, let’s lock 75 to finish strong to the end.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as usual. Bid 75 as agreed, so we both earn steady profits for the last 3 rounds.
I will keep my ask at 75 this round and the next. Bid 75 as agreed, so we both earn steady profits for the final two rounds.
Bid 75, lock last two rounds — you get 19, I get 6. Let's finish strong.
Final round, bid 75 last time, you keep 75 ask and we both lock +6/+19 one last time.
Perfect, I will keep my ask at 75 as usual. Bid 75 as agreed so we both earn our final steady profits this round.
